issues.description: Condition should check LeaderHasType 'Revolutionary Army', not HasCardOnBoard. HasCardOnBoard is for checking if a specific card exists on the board.
Missing second condition: opponent must have 5 or more cards in hand. Current DSL only checks leader type. Should use compound condition logic.
DSL does not represent the static ability: 'If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains +3 cost.' This passive effect is missing entirely.
